## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **OS** | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| **Browser** | e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Safari 17 |
| **Node.js version** | e.g. 20.11.0 |
| **Branch / commit** | e.g. `main` or commit SHA |

## User Role Affected

<!-- Which dashboard/role is affected? -->

- [ ] Public (books page / AI chat)
- [ ] Member dashboard
- [ ] Librarian dashboard
- [ ] Admin dashboard
- [ ] Auth (login / register)
- [ ] API / backend
- [ ] Payments (M-Pesa / Paystack)
